title: Come and See

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: From mountain peaks to ocean deep
Your glory fills the earth
Let every voice lift up in praise
Proclaim Your matchless worth
The waves resound with thunderous sound
Your power on display
The nations see Your mighty deeds
Your wonders day by day

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing out with joy, all the earth
Let praises fill the sky
Come see what God has done for us
His love will never die

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Through fire and flood,
You've brought us through
Your hand has kept us strong
When burdens weighed our spirits down
You turned our pain to song
Our feet may slip but will not fall
Your grace has set us free
The trials that tested faith like gold
Have drawn us close to Thee

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing out with joy, all the earth
Let praises fill the sky
Come see what God has done for us
His love will never die

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Come and listen, all who fear Him
Hear what He has done for me
Every prayer He's heard and answered
Every chain He's broken free

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: With grateful hearts we bring our praise
Our voices will proclaim
The God who holds our lives secure
Forever stays the same
Let all the earth bow down in awe
Before Your holy throne
For You alone are worthy, Lord
All glory is Your own

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing out with joy, all the earth
Let praises fill the sky
Come see what God has done for us
His love will never die

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: From age to age Your faithfulness
Has been our sure defense
Each generation tells Your praise
With holy confidence
Our children's children will proclaim
The wonders You have shown
For You're the God who saves and keeps
Your people as Your own

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing out with joy, all the earth
Let praises fill the sky
Come see what God has done for us
His love will never die

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Sing out with joy, all the earth
Let praises fill the sky
Come see what God has done for us
His love will never die
His love will never, never die

epigraph: and I will declare what he hath done for my soul
